title: BEM-696 stable hourly delta
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/protocols','governance/triggers']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-19 | 10:13 (UTC+3)'
renderer=Path('scripts/render_curator_hourly_report.py')
text=renderer.read_text(errors='ignore') if renderer.exists() else ''
if not text:
    status='failed'; blocker={'code':'RENDERER_MISSING'}; checks=[]
else:
    # Replace fragile snapshot comparison with stable status fingerprint comparison.
    old='''previous_snapshot = load_json(SNAPSHOT)\nunchanged = previous_snapshot == current_snapshot'''
    new='''previous_snapshot = load_json(SNAPSHOT)\ncurrent_fingerprint = {\n    "stage_done": done,\n    "stage_total": total,\n    "stage_percent": percent,\n    "roadmap_done": done,\n    "roadmap_total": total,\n    "roadmap_percent": percent,\n    "rows": current_snapshot["rows"],\n}\nprevious_fingerprint = previous_snapshot.get("fingerprint") if isinstance(previous_snapshot, dict) else None\nif previous_fingerprint is None and isinstance(previous_snapshot, dict):\n    previous_fingerprint = {\n        "stage_done": previous_snapshot.get("stage_done"),\n        "stage_total": previous_snapshot.get("stage_total"),\n        "stage_percent": previous_snapshot.get("stage_percent"),\n        "roadmap_done": previous_snapshot.get("roadmap_done"),\n        "roadmap_total": previous_snapshot.get("roadmap_total"),\n        "roadmap_percent": previous_snapshot.get("roadmap_percent"),\n        "rows": previous_snapshot.get("rows"),\n    }\nunchanged = previous_fingerprint == current_fingerprint'''
    if old in text:
        text=text.replace(old,new)
    elif 'unchanged = previous_snapshot == current_snapshot' in text:
        text=text.replace('unchanged = previous_snapshot == current_snapshot', 'current_fingerprint = {"stage_done": done, "stage_total": total, "stage_percent": percent, "roadmap_done": done, "roadmap_total": total, "roadmap_percent": percent, "rows": current_snapshot["rows"]}\nprevious_fingerprint = previous_snapshot.get("fingerprint") if isinstance(previous_snapshot, dict) else None\nif previous_fingerprint is None and isinstance(previous_snapshot, dict):\n    previous_fingerprint = {"stage_done": previous_snapshot.get("stage_done"), "stage_total": previous_snapshot.get("stage_total"), "stage_percent": previous_snapshot.get("stage_percent"), "roadmap_done": previous_snapshot.get("roadmap_done"), "roadmap_total": previous_snapshot.get("roadmap_total"), "roadmap_percent": previous_snapshot.get("roadmap_percent"), "rows": previous_snapshot.get("rows")}\nunchanged = previous_fingerprint == current_fingerprint')
    # Ensure message wording is exact and period-based.
    text=text.replace('Изменений за отчётный час нет.', 'Изменений за отчётный период нет.')
    # Store fingerprint inside snapshot file for future comparisons, but keep rows for readability.
    old2='''SNAPSHOT.write_text(json.dumps(current_snapshot, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + SEP, encoding="utf-8")'''
    new2='''snapshot_to_store = dict(current_snapshot)\nsnapshot_to_store["fingerprint"] = current_fingerprint\nSNAPSHOT.write_text(json.dumps(snapshot_to_store, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + SEP, encoding="utf-8")'''
    if old2 in text:
        text=text.replace(old2,new2)
    elif 'SNAPSHOT.write_text(json.dumps(current_snapshot' in text and 'snapshot_to_store' not in text:
        text=text.replace('SNAPSHOT.write_text(json.dumps(current_snapshot, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + SEP, encoding="utf-8")', new2)
    renderer.write_text(text)
    canon=Path('governance/protocols/OPERATOR_TELEGRAM_REPORT_CANON.md')
    oldcanon=canon.read_text(errors='ignore') if canon.exists() else ''
    addition=sep+'## BEM-696 | Stable fingerprint для no-change hourly report'+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'No-change определяется по стабильному fingerprint: проценты этапа/roadmap и строки таблицы статусов. Время формирования, период, версия схемы и служебные поля не считаются изменением. Если fingerprint не изменился, таблица не отправляется, сообщение: `Изменений за отчётный период нет.`'+sep
    if 'BEM-696 | Stable fingerprint' not in oldcanon:
        canon.write_text(oldcanon+addition)
    trigger=Path('governance/triggers/curator_hourly_report.trigger')
    trigger.write_text('BEM-696 trigger stable fingerprint no-table '+created+sep)
    rtext=renderer.read_text(errors='ignore')
    checks=[
        {'name':'renderer_exists','pass':renderer.exists(),'evidence':str(renderer)},
        {'name':'stable_fingerprint_present','pass':'current_fingerprint' in rtext and 'previous_fingerprint' in rtext,'evidence':str(renderer)},
        {'name':'full_snapshot_compare_removed','pass':'unchanged = previous_snapshot == current_snapshot' not in rtext,'evidence':str(renderer)},
        {'name':'period_no_change_wording','pass':'Изменений за отчётный период нет.' in rtext,'evidence':str(renderer)},
        {'name':'table_conditional_kept','pass':'if unchanged:' in rtext and 'else:' in rtext and '№ | Наименование' in rtext,'evidence':str(renderer)},
        {'name':'snapshot_stores_fingerprint','pass':'snapshot_to_store' in rtext and 'fingerprint' in rtext,'evidence':str(renderer)},
    ]
    failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
    status='pass' if not failed else 'failed'
    blocker=None if status=='pass' else {'code':'STABLE_FINGERPRINT_PATCH_FAILED','failed':failed}
state={'schema_version':'hourly_stable_fingerprint_no_table.v1','bem':'BEM-696','status':status,'checks':checks,'message':'Изменений за отчётный период нет.','blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem696_hourly_stable_fingerprint_no_table.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem696_hourly_stable_fingerprint_no_table.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-696 | Hourly Stable Fingerprint No Table | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'No-change теперь определяется только по стабильному fingerprint статусов, а не по служебным полям snapshot.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem696_hourly_stable_fingerprint_no_table','status':status,'message':'Изменений за отчётный период нет.','blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem696_hourly_stable_fingerprint_no_table.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-696 '+status.upper()+': stable fingerprint no-change patch applied.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(renderer),str(Path('governance/protocols/OPERATOR_TELEGRAM_REPORT_CANON.md')),str(Path('governance/triggers/curator_hourly_report.trigger')),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Patched hourly report delta logic to compare stable status fingerprint only, so unchanged status sends short no-change message without table')
"""
No issue comments.
